itunes_results.name: Tinybeans - Family Album

daily_conscious_parenting_streak.notes: 7.85M parenting community. All apps track milestones or share photos. Zero apps gamify the daily HABIT of conscious parenting practices (reading together, limit screens, one-on-one time) with streak/XP.

daily_family_reading_streak.notes: 2.1M dedicated parenting/toddler reading community (excluding broad r/books overlap). All apps deliver content to kids. No app gamifies the daily FAMILY reading-aloud habit with streak tracking and XP.

itunes_results.name: Couple - Relationship App
itunes_results.category: SOFT — partner communication app with shared timeline and some habit nudges — partial streak, limited gamification

itunes_results.name: Love Nudge - 5 Love Languages

daily_relationship_habits_streak.notes: 8.49M relationship community. Couple, Between, Love Nudge, Gottman all have partial habit features. Gap exists: none build a full daily streak gamification system with XP/levels for both partners simultaneously.

daily_communication_skills_streak.notes: 3.5M communication/self-improvement community. No dedicated daily communication skills streak app. Orai covers public speaking only. Huge gap for daily conversational skill habit gamification.
